verses.text: Edom gam, Bozrah khua panin puan ausan silhin a hong pai, a puansilhna-ah minthan'na mel nei-in, ama thahatna tawh a hong paipa kua ahi hiam? A honkhiazo dingin hatna a nei, gualzawhna thu a zasak dingin a hong paipa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hi hi
Bang hangin na puan san a, na puansilhte, leenggah cilna-ah leenggah a cilpa' puan tawh kibang ahi hiam

Mite lak panin kuamah in kei hong huhlo a, keimah guak in leenggah cil bangin minam dangte ka cil hi. Sinsona tawh amaute ka cil a, hehna tawh amaute ka tuancil hi. Ka puan tungah amaute' si hong kithehgawp a, ka puan khempeuh tungah sisan hong baang khin hi
Ka mite ka hotkhiat ding hunta ka sa a, a galte uh gimpiak ding a hun hita hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi
Hong huh ding mi ka zong a, ahi zongin kuamah omlo hi. Kei a hong huh ding a omloh ciangin lamdang ka sa hi. Ahi zongin ka hehna in hong thahatsak a, keimahmah thahatna tawh ka gualzo hi
Ka sinsona tawh minam dangte cilin, ka hehna hangin amaute zukham ka bangsak a, amaute' sisan leilakah ka thehthang hi.

Topa' itna kip, Topa phatnate, Topa in eite tungah a hong piak khempeuh tawh a kizui leh, ama hehpihna leh a lianpi ama itna kip tawh a kizui-in amaute tunga a piak, Israel innkuan tungah ama hoihna lianpite ka gengen ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Amaute pen keima mi taktak hi a, amaute in kei hong khemlo ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin a lungkhamna panun amaute a honkhia hi
Vantung mite' hotkhiat hiloin, Topa mahmah in amaute honkhia hi. A itna leh a hehpihna tawh amaute honkhia a, amah in a beisa hun khempeuhah amaute hoihtakin a kem hi
Ahih hangin amaute in lehdo uh a, ama kha siangtho a dahsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pen amaute' gal suak a, amahmah in amaute a do hi
Tua ciangin amaute in hun lui lai, ama nasem Moses' hun a phawk uh hi. Ama mi a makaite honkhia-in, tuipi sung panin a paikhiatpih Topa koi-ah omta ahi hiam? Amaute' tungah ama kha a piapa
Moses tung tawnin a vangliatna zangin na lianpipi a sempa, ama mite' mai-ah tuite khenkhamin, a minthan' tawntungna dingin hih bang nate a sempa, tu-in koi-ah omta ahi hiam, ci uh hi
Topa in tuithuk kantanin amaute a paipih ciangin leilaka sakol pai bangin kip mahmah uh a, amaute puklo uh hi
Lonona kuamsung a zuansuk bawngte bangin Topa in amaute tawldamna a pia hi. Tua bangin Topa in a mite lamlak ahih manin ama min thang tawntung hi.

A siangtho, a minthang, nangma omna vantung panin hong ensuk in la hong mu in. Nangma deihsakna leh na vangliatna koi-ah omta ahi hiam? Na lungsim' deihna leh nangma hehpihna kote-a' dingin maimangta hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh, Abraham in kote hong huhloin, Israel in kote hong phawkloh hangin nang pen kote' Pa na hi hi. Topa aw, nang pen kote' Pa na hi a, nangmah in tanglai pek pan kote a hong honkhiapa na hi hi

Topa aw, kote in nang kong kihtakloh theihna dingun bang hangin na lampi panin kote hong pialsakin ka lungsim uh khauhsak na hi hiam? Nangma nasemte, nangma luah minamte na ngaihsutna-in hong kihei kik in
Nangma mi siangthote in tawlkhat sung bek na biakinn nei a, ko hong langpangte in tua na biakinn pen tuancilgawp khinta hi
Kote pen nangmah in cikmahin na uk ngeiloh mite, nangma mi ahi ngeilo mite tawh a kibang ka suakkhin uh hi.
